name: 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)

extensions.name: 愛善傳承締祥和
notes: Adjusted the conclusion to emphasize the longstanding bond between the Master and Lin's mother, framing the story as an example of members of the Dharma family caring for one another.
Remember to include the closing phrase "Let's take a listen" at the end.

extensions.name: 愛滿地慈少畢典
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 愛滿地慈少畢典 2:12

extensions.name: 守護花東聚善能
notes: Added background information identifying Dr. Hsu Ren-jun as director of the Cancer Center at Hualien Tzu Chi Hospital.

extensions.name: 賴索托冬令
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 賴索托冬令 2:11 (請寫完小編文再開始做)

extensions.name: 瓜照顧戶複查
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 瓜照顧戶複查 0:42

sourceText: Alex Chen接下來請Alex翻譯 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)，長24分48秒，預計做19小時51分，由6/12（五）15:00起算，deadline為6/17(三) 9:51，謝謝。

name: 3集日日有新知 (如何讓蘋果更耐旱＋現代人都驚嘆的2500年前宇宙觀＋少睡多讀成績好?)
notes: Added the speaker's self-introduction because there is sufficient subtitle time here and recurring speakers in this series can often be identified from earlier episodes.
Replaced "stars" with a more general term because the speaker is using 星星 loosely here and the examples include planets, which are not actually stars.
Softened the phrasing about our worries to reflect the speaker's positive intent of making them feel lighter rather than implying our lives or actions are unimportant.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯3集日日有新知，預計做7小時12分鐘，從6/18(四) 08:41開始算，deadline為6/18 (四)16:53，謝謝~

name: 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版

extensions.name: 聞法造福淨心靈
notes: Added a time marker so the introduction could bring in Tzu Chi volunteers from Central and South America more smoothly and broaden the overall scope.

extensions.name: 弘揚佛法共成就
notes: Added the date because Dharma tour pieces are published quickly and participating Tzu Chi volunteers may be eager to see them soon after the event.
Reworked the introduction to specify that this talk was for the Taipei Buddha Bathing Ceremony team and to credit different volunteer groups in a style closer to the Chinese introduction.

sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版, 長度35分, 預計翻譯28時(3天4時), 從6/18（四）16:53起算, deadline 為6/25(四)11:53, 謝謝！

name: 人文講堂(醫生到我家 - 呂立) 4 個短版

extensions.name: 視病如親暖杏林
notes: Reworked the introduction and summary to more closely reflect the episode's spoken content.

extensions.name: Reducing Brain Age to Prevent Dementia (人文講堂 - 養腦 防失智 - 曾文毅 [2])

2.	7/22(三)發 alex
Reducing Brain Age to Prevent Dementia (人文講堂 - 養腦 防失智 - 曾文毅 [2])

notes: Reworked the expert introduction to replace a formal academic title with a clearer description for general readers.
Added the name of the featured speaker to the hashtags.

sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯人文講堂(醫生到我家 - 呂立) 4 個短版, 長度22分, 預計做17時36分(2天1時36分), 從6/26（五）09:43起算，deadline為6/30(二) 11:19，謝謝！
